{{Quote|Oh, it's just about three levels past state-of-the-art, that's all. It's got an incredible flight system, and unbelievable weapons targeting array, and a crazy, one of a kind defensive shoot-back system I think Daddy must have stolen from somewhere.|[[Sansia Bardrin]]|<ref name="Jade Solitaire">{{StoryCite|story=Jade Solitaire|book=Tales from the New Republic}}</ref>}}
The '''''Jade's Fire''''' was a highly modified [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]]. Originally owned by the industrialist [[Ja Bardrin]] and named '''''The Winning Gamble''''', the ship later belonged to [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], who named it ''Jade's Fire''.

The luxury [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] consisted of a wide fuselage flanked by two engine nacelles. It was painted orange and red in a flame pattern.

''Jade's Fire'' featured a remote beckon call. The ship had been upgraded with state-of-the-art weapons tracking systems and a unique shoot-back system that would detect the angle of incoming enemy shots and return fire in that direction. Mara's later ship, the ''[[Jade Shadow]]'', also possessed the special firing system.

==History==
[[Ja Bardrin]] arranged to have the ship and his daughter, [[Sansia Bardrin|Sansia]], kidnapped so that it could collect sensor data on the defenses of [[Chay Praysh]]'s headquarters. He then forced Mara Jade to rescue the ship and his daughter, holding the crew of ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' as hostages.

When Sansia learned of her father's involvement in the affair upon her rescue and return home, she gave the ship to Mara Jade to jointly compensate for her rescue from [[Torpris]] and annoy her father. It became the first ship that Mara privately owned, free and clear, and she renamed it ''Jade's Fire''.

The ''Jade's Fire'', piloted by Mara Jade, joined forces with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] in the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']] (a ship of the same class as ''Jade's Fire''), [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in his enhanced [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] to battle the [[Sacorrian Triad]] fleet in the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]].

The vessel was destroyed over [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]] during Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade's [[Mission to Nirauan|attempt]] to infiltrate [[Hand of Thrawn|''The Hand of Thrawn'']]. She achieved this by intentionally crashing her ship into the docking bay there.
